title: Bahrain Gaming Sector Investment Framework
summary: Official investment promotion material identifies Bahrain’s flexible regulatory system and data-protection and data-jurisdiction laws as supporting the gaming sector, but it is not a dedicated gaming regulation.

theme_notes.online_content.gaming_esports: Economic development policy material for Bahrain gaming sector.

notes: Instrument type recorded as uncertain in the source (policy?). Related instruments: Related to PDPL and cloud/data jurisdiction laws
